title: HRMS Optimization for Utilization and Performance
summary: Enhanced HR systems to improve workforce visibility, utilization tracking, and performance evaluation.
problemStatement: Limited visibility into resource utilization and lack of structured performance tracking.
solution: Built utilization dashboards, implemented task tracking mechanisms, and automated appraisal workflows.
impact: Improved resource allocation decisions, increased transparency in performance evaluation, and enabled data-driven HR management.
leadershipValue: Bridges HR and operations to improve workforce effectiveness.

interactionFiles.label: Interactive case brief
interactionFiles.description: Review the workforce visibility model, utilization tracking, and appraisal automation flow.
